= AP =
AP, which means Alexis Power, is a kind of alliance for [[Xis]] and [[Calvi]], because they have got the same real name : Alexis. The two players who have "# AP" at the end of their nick belong to [[RIP]].

The legend says that, when AP's two powers are playing together, the Alexis's wisdom and power are at their best.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20120711035729/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/AP -->
